Beachfront Resort
The Trip

Four Nights
on the Pacific Coast

Four all-inclusive nights at the five-star Pueblo Bonito Los Cabos, paired with two rounds on two of Cabo's most dramatic Pacific layouts — the Jack Nicklaus Signature Quivira Golf Club and Solmar Golf Links. Food and drinks are included from the moment you arrive, and your all-inclusive plan is transferable to the neighbouring Rosé and Sunset Beach resorts.

Every package is based on double occupancy and includes all taxes, resort fees, golf carts, and practice balls — so the only thing left to settle is the leaderboard. Group rates are available for three nights pre- and post-stay.

Your Tour Hosts

An American Grunt
Golf Tours Charity Tour

The Los Cabos Golf Classic is proudly hosted by American Grunt Golf Tours — a charity golf tour bringing patriots together on the world's great courses for golf, camaraderie, and a cause that matters. Made for the Patriot.

Schedule

Five Days,
Two Rounds

Thirty-six holes of competitive golf across two of Cabo's finest courses, framed by a welcome evening, a free day to enjoy the resort, and a complimentary Winner's Dinner to close the week.

Day 1 · Wed 14 Apr
Arrival & Welcome
Airport transfers to Pueblo Bonito Los Cabos. Check in to your Junior or Luxury Suite, settle in, and gather for welcome drinks as the all-inclusive begins.
Day 2 · Thu 15 Apr
Round One — Quivira
18 competitive holes at the Jack Nicklaus Signature Quivira Golf Club, perched on the Pacific cliffs of Cabo San Lucas. Cart, practice balls, green fee, taxes and resort fees included.
Day 3 · Fri 16 Apr
Resort Day at Leisure
A free day on the Pacific — private beach, pools, the Armonia Spa, or an optional activity. The all-inclusive runs throughout, across Pueblo Bonito, Rosé and Sunset Beach.
Day 4 · Sat 17 Apr
Round Two — Solmar & Winner's Dinner
The decisive 18 holes at Solmar Golf Links, then a complimentary private Winner's Dinner — open bar and a plated or buffet menu as champions are crowned.
Day 5 · Sun 18 Apr
Departure
A final resort morning at your own pace before departure transfers. Group rates remain available should you wish to extend your stay.
The Golf

Two Rounds,
Two Pacific Courses

Round One · Thu 15 Apr
Quivira Golf Club
Jack Nicklaus Signature design on the cliffs of Cabo San Lucas, where the fairways meet the Pacific. One of the most dramatic routings in Mexico.
Round Two · Sat 17 Apr
Solmar Golf Links
A links-style layout on Cabo's Pacific coastline, playing into the prevailing breeze. The decisive round before the Winner's Dinner.
Each Round Includes
Green fee
Shared golf cart
Practice balls
All taxes & resort fees included
Group Participant Benefits

More Than
Just the Golf

Special group rates for 3 nights pre & post stay*
10% off group experiences — cooking, tequila & wine tasting
Priority room assignments
20% off Armonia Spa treatments (50+ min)
Up to 25% off activities with recommended vendors
Up to 15% off airport transfers
Complimentary parking & valet

*Subject to availability and group minimums — confirm with your coordinator.

Additional Events

Winner's Dinner
Experience

One complimentary private event to crown your champions — banquet or cocktail setup, a buffet or plated dinner from the resort menu, and an open bar with up to two hours of service.

Included & Optional
Banquet or cocktail setup
Buffet or plated dinner from menu
Open bar included
Up to 2 hours service (before 11 PM)
Oceanview venues at no extra cost
$150 credit toward a private bonfire
Beach setups +$15 pp · gratuities $25 pp · minimum guest count applies — confirm with your coordinator.
What's Included

Everything
Taken Care Of

Your package is fully all-inclusive across food and drinks, with golf, transfers, taxes and resort fees built in. Pack your clubs — we'll handle the rest.

4-Night All-Inclusive Stay
Junior or Luxury Suite at Pueblo Bonito Los Cabos, with all food and drinks included throughout your stay.
Two Championship Rounds
One round each at Quivira Golf Club and Solmar Golf Links — green fees, carts, and practice balls included.
All-Inclusive, Transferable
Your all-inclusive plan is valid across Pueblo Bonito Los Cabos and the neighbouring Rosé and Sunset Beach resorts.
Winner's Dinner Experience
One complimentary private event with open bar and a plated or buffet menu to celebrate the champions.
Group Participant Benefits
Priority rooms, spa and activity discounts, transfer savings, and complimentary parking and valet.
All Taxes & Resort Fees
Every tax, resort fee, golf cart, and bucket of practice balls is included — no surprises on departure.
Accommodation

Choose Your
Suite

All suites are within Pueblo Bonito Los Cabos — a five-star beachfront all-inclusive resort on Cabo's Pacific coast. Prices are per person based on double occupancy; single-occupancy rates are shown on each suite. Select a category to register your interest.

Junior Suites · Pueblo Bonito Los Cabos

Over 525 square feet of living space with spectacular ocean views. Sized for up to four guests, with two double beds, an open living space, and a kitchenette stocked with a full complement of dishes and utensils for four.

Booking Partner

Exclusively booked
by golftours.com

golftours.com is a global golf travel brand specialising in competitive and luxury golf experiences across the world's finest destinations. From tee time to touchdown, every detail is handled by a team that lives and breathes the game.

As an ASTA & TIDS accredited agency, golftours.com brings the professionalism of a fully licensed travel operator and the passion of a dedicated golf travel specialist — so your trip is as well organised off the course as it is on it.
